overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a game engine showing a grand gothic library interior with towering bookshelves, stone arches, and warm morning light filtering through windows. Two figures sit in armchairs within the ornate reading room, with one in the foreground facing away from the camera.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a grand gothic library interior with towering bookshelves and stone architecture. Two figures sit in armchairs - one in the foreground with their back to the camera, and another in the mid-ground facing left. Warm light filters through arched windows, illuminating the ornate rug and antique celestial globe in the center of the room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a grand gothic library bathed in the soft glow of morning light. It begins by capturing the towering bookshelves and heavy stone architecture that define the ornate reading room. As the eye wanders through the space, the warm light filtering through arched windows illuminates a detailed rug and an antique celestial globe positioned in the center of the room. The scene remains focused on the quiet atmosphere, centering on two figures resting in armchairs, with one positioned in the foreground facing away from the camera while the other sits in the mid-ground.
